{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Light
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Light]] has an [[Aethertech eye]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
